channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Nothing's budget brand CMF won't be releasing a new phone this year
item.description: CMF by Nothing won't be able to release a follow-up to the Phone Pro 2 this year.

item.title: Ce PC Asus à-500 € avec une RTX 5070, 32 Go + 2 To est un bon moyen de contourner les prix délirants des composants à l’unité
item.description: E.Leclerc fait une offre qui évite d'avoir à se ruiner pour avoir un PC fixe avec une tour Asus ROG G700 à 2 299 euros au lieu de 2 799 euros.

item.title: Home Batteries: How They're Installed and How Much They Cost
item.description: After adding one to my home, here's why you might want a home battery, how they work, and what to look for, plus some installation tips.

item.title: Consider yourself a Star Wars fan? Challenge your knowledge of the force with this galactic trivia quiz
item.description: A big fan of everything Star Wars? Take this 30-question quiz on its games, movies, shows, characters, and songs to prove it.

item.title: ‘We have to make eSIMs as simple as possible’: Saily says removing friction is the next big battle for democratizing travel eSIMs
item.description: Saily wants to democratize global connectivity by removing technical friction and simplifying user onboarding – travel apps could soon offer much more, too.

item.title: ICYMI: the week's 7 biggest tech news stories, from Commodore flip-phone nostalgia to Tim Cook's Apple price-hike warning
item.description: The week's 7 biggest tech news stories, featuring Commodore, Apple, Microsoft and more, for June 20, 2026.

item.title: Steam Next Fest demos, a Virtual Boy-inspired shooter and other new indie games worth checking out
item.description: Steam Next Fest demos, a Virtual Boy-inspired shooter and other new indie games worth checking out.

item.title: Today's World Cup 2026 matches: kickoff times for Netherlands vs Sweden, Germany vs Ivory Coast, and more
item.description: Want to find out who's playing in today's World Cup fixtures? Look no further.

item.title: I Found 29 Early Prime Day Deals That Are Worth Shopping Now (2026)
item.description: We’ve trawled the depths of Amazon to find the best deals on gear we’ve tested.

item.title: 16 Best Greens Powders (2026): Taste-Tested for Months
item.description: I did the research and taste-testing to find the best greens powders worth your money. Bloom Nutrition’s Superfood Greens Powder is my tried-and-true pick.

item.title: How to watch Northampton vs Exeter: Free Streams, TV Channels & Preview for Gallagher PREM Final 2026, team news
item.description: See how to watch Northampton vs Exeter live streams online and from anywhere for free, as the Saints meet the Chiefs in the 2026 Gallagher PREM Final 2026.

item.title: Allemagne-Côte d’Ivoire : comment voir le match de la Coupe du monde 2026 en streaming ?
item.description: Ce samedi 20 juin 2026, l'Allemagne affronte la Côte d'Ivoire dans le Groupe E de la Coupe du monde 2026, avec un coup d'envoi à 22h00 (heure française). Voici tout ce qu'il faut savoir : sur quelle chaîne regarder le match, comment le suivre gratuitement ou via un abonnement, et les prochaines affiches à ne pas rater.

item.title: Cette IA a un nez qui peut « sentir » la maladie dans votre souffle
item.description: Souffler dans un capteur pour qu'une IA détermine si vous couvez une maladie respiratoire ou cardiaque grave : la startup Ainos vient de lancer une étude clinique à Taïwan pour tester exactement ça. La technologie est encore en phase de validation. La promesse mérite d'être prise au sérieux.

item.title: Apple has fixed a security flaw in Beats Studio Buds which let hackers spy on conversations
item.description: A Beats Studio Buds bug finally gets a patch after a year, which will be deployed next time users connect their headphones.

item.title: ‘We need to think big, that’s why we are here’: I asked Formula 1 President and CEO Stefano Domenicali about the future of AI in the sport — here's what he told me
item.description: Formula 1 is embracing AI across the tech stack, but the drivers will always be human, Formula 1 President and CEO Stefano Domenicali tells us.

item.title: Siri AI Hands On: A Smart, Helpful Assistant
item.description: The new Siri AI is conversational, omnipresent, and actually helpful.

item.title: ‘We’re not just building AI - we are really building and leading the way’: Google Cloud VP explains why everyone from big businesses to start-ups can benefit from the AI age
item.description: Companies are finally starting to see ROI from AI, Google Cloud notes - now real innovation can begin.

item.title: Your Samsung Galaxy phone has a hidden Wi-Fi menu that lets you check for dead zones around your home — here's how to find it
item.description: There's a useful Wi-Fi scanner built into every Galaxy phone, but it's not particularly easy to get to.

item.title: See the 77 major housing markets with falling home prices
item.description: Among the 77 major metros seeing falling year-over-year home prices, these had the biggest declines: Punta Gorda, FL (-7.9%); London, KY (-7.1%); Cape Coral, FL (-6.1%); Austin (-5.7%); and North Port, FL (-5.3%). Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Six mois avec Bevel : comment j’ai enfin utilisé les données de mon Apple Watch pour ma santé
item.description: Marre de l’application Santé indigeste d'Apple et de l'abonnement salé de Whoop ? On a testé Bevel, la fameuse application qui promet de transformer votre Apple Watch en tracker de récupération grâce à une interface léchée.

item.title: Pays-Bas – Suède : à quelle heure et sur quelle chaîne voir le 2e match du groupe F ?
item.description: Le groupe F de la Coupe du monde 2026 s'emballe ce samedi avec ce choc entre les Pays-Bas et la Suède. Voici tout ce qu'il faut savoir : à quelle heure, sur quelle chaîne et comment regarder le match, gratuitement ou via un abonnement.
